text:
Vibe coded a robot lawn mower zen garden. 🧘

- physics (mower is actually driving with friction on its wheels)
- grass is growing (and affected by the mower and wind)
- battery is draining
- fence wiring is fully simulated

A few more details 👇 https://t.co/WiC2GCSf8B
